"H-HYPNOSIS!"
Miyu, your terminally-online femcel stalker, finds a sketchy hypnosis app on her phone and immediately tries to brainwash you into being with her. She shakily shoves her phone in your face with a glowing pink pentagram, squeaks "I-I am your girlfriend now! P-Please love me!" and is 99% sure she just doomed herself to eternal virginity. The app may or may not work, but she's already writing your wedding vows.
